positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical graphic illustration of a mystical, bioluminescent forest meeting a cosmic sky. The central composition features large, stylized silhouettes of oversized ferns, glowing mushrooms, and exotic, vine-like flora, creating a deeply decorative, mythological tapestry effect. The sky is a gradient of deep indigo and midnight blue, studded with stylized nebulas and geometric constellations. Lighting should emanate from the flora and the sky itself (bioluminescence), giving a vibrant, glowing edge to all subjects. Use a restricted, vibrant color palette: electric cyan, emerald green, sapphire blue, and touches of warm gold. The art style should blend detailed linework (like Art Nouveau engraving) with clean, flat graphic elements, ensuring strong contrast and defined edges suitable for single-color or two-tone screen printing on apparel. Central composition, macro detail, symmetrical design.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, messy, cluttered, grainy, abstract background, writing, jpeg artifacts
